title: Schradera monocephala
taxonomy: Schradera monocephala is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The classification of Schradera monocephala is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, the clade Eudicots, the clade Asterids, the order Gentianales, the family Rubiaceae, the genus Schradera, and the species S. monocephala. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder or coffee family.
